### All Submissions:

* [ ] I have run `just lint` and there are no errors.
* [ ] I have run `just test` and all tests pass.
* [ ] I have checked there aren't other open [Pull Requests](../../../pulls) for the same change.

<!-- You can erase any parts of this template not applicable to your Pull Request. -->

### New Feature Submissions:

1. [ ] Does your submission include tests for the new behaviour?
2. [ ] Have you added or updated docs (README, docstrings) as needed?

### Changes to Core Behaviour:

* [ ] Have you explained what your changes do and why they're needed?
* [ ] Have you updated existing tests or added new ones for the changes?
* [ ] Does the change affect the CLI? Have you tested with `--json` output if applicable?
